question: Will Jinbaobao's TTM tin production fall below 80 kt on May 31, 2026?
reason: Jinbaobao's recent export ban and global supply constraints may reduce production below 80,000 tonnes.
evidence: Jinbaobao's export ban affects 12% of global tin supply, tightening the market.
Global tin production declined by 2.7% in 2024 due to supply disruptions.
China's tin smelters operated at 53.97% capacity in July 2025, indicating production challenges.
raw: {"yes_probability": 0.15, "confidence": "medium", "short_reason": "Jinbaobao's recent export ban and global supply constraints may reduce production below 80,000 tonnes.", "key_evidence": ["Jinbaobao's export ban affects 12% of global tin supply, tightening the market.", "Global tin production declined by 2.7% in 2024 due to supply disruptions.", "China's tin smelters operated at 53.97% capacity in July 2025, indicating production challenges."], "source_urls": ["https://www.internationaltin.org/global-tin-production-falls-in-2024-on-supply-disruptions/", "https://discoveryalert.com.au/news/tin-smelters-yunnan-jiangxi-performance-2025/"]}
